rdf:Description.dc:description: Strain-elevation ratios as a bending-vs-tilting discriminator (manuscript §4.1). Single panel at 85 mm column width. RMS strain ratios bot/mid and bot/top plotted against S/D for T4 (dense sat., elastic bending) and T5 (loose sat., rigid-body tilting). T4 bot/mid jumps +17.8 % from baseline to the first scour stage and plateaus — textbook fixity-point migration. T5 bot/mid stays at 0.173 +/- 0.001 across every stage — no migration, consistent with rigid-body tilting about the yielded upwind bucket. Post-backfill values shown as star markers at S/D = 0.65 offset.
